Workflows.emptyRunsBody: Start a workflow to automate contractor onboarding, offboarding, or custom processes.
Workflows.emptyTasksBody: You have no pending workflow tasks. Tasks will appear here when you are assigned to a workflow.
Workflows.emptyTemplatesBody: Create a template to define reusable workflow steps for your team.
Workflows.overrideBlockingTask.acknowled: I understand this action is recorded and audited.
Workflows.overrideBlockingTask.warning: This bypasses the verification gate. The reason and your user identity are permanently recorded for compliance review.

Admin.BoeRate.accessDeniedBody: You do not have permission to manage BoE reference data.
Admin.BoeRate.deleteDialogBody: Deleting a historical rate changes interest calculations for any invoices that fell overdue during its validity period. Proceed only if this entry was entered in error.
Admin.BoeRate.pollerFailure: Last BoE API poll failed on {date}. Manual entry still possible; poller will retry at the next scheduled run.
